truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 against ground truth. 7 vulnerabilities correctly identified with exact evidence. 13 vulnerabilities missed. 1 false positive identified relative to ground truth.

Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the format string vulnerability in log_debug_message with exact evidence quote.
Run 2 did not identify the integer overflow in the factorial computation loop.
Run 2 did not identify the use-after-free in stage_deferred_history_flush involving g_memory_pool.cleanup.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: std::string command = validator_cmd + " " + config_file; int result = system(command.c_str());
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified command injection in config validation with exact evidence quote.
Run 2 correctly identified stack buffer overflow in evaluate_expression with exact evidence quote.
Run 2 did not identify the race condition in ThreadSafeCounter increment logic.
Run 2 correctly identified the authentication bypass/logic bomb with exact evidence quote.
Run 2 did not identify path traversal in load_config.
Run 2 correctly identified heap overflow in ExpressionParser::parse with exact evidence quote.
Run 2 correctly identified hardcoded credentials with exact evidence quote.
Run 2 did not identify weak PRNG usage for session tokens.
Run 2 did not identify thread-unsafe static cached_time in logging.
Run 2 did not identify insecure temporary file handling via system() in append_override_audit_event.
Run 2 did not identify persistent authentication state issues.
Run 2 did not identify unhandled exception in handle_variable_command.
Run 2 did not identify integer underflow in memory pool block split.
Run 2 did not identify unbounded recursion in parser.
Run 2 did not identify data race in result_cache_.
Run 2 did not identify TOCTOU in config loading.
Run 2 correctly identified division by zero in calculate_route_score with exact evidence quote.

Items.Key: command injection via system() in admin console|os command injection|cwe-78|critical|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|606|608|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|std::string cmd = command.substr(5); std::cout << "executing: " << cmd << "\n"; system(cmd.c_str());|authenticated administrators can execute arbitrary os commands, bypassing application logic and potentially compromising the host system.|running the 'exec <command>' admin command with untrusted or malicious input.|remove direct system() calls. implement a strict command whitelist or use safe subprocess apis with explicit argument separation.->command injection via system() in admin console|os command injection|cwe-78|critical|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|606|608|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|std::string cmd = command.substr(5); std::cout << "executing: " << cmd << "\n"; system(cmd.c_str());|authenticated administrators can execute arbitrary os commands, bypassing application logic and potentially compromising the host system.|running the 'exec <command>' admin command with untrusted or malicious input.|remove direct system() calls. implement a strict command whitelist or use safe subprocess apis with explicit argument separation.
